pageContext.name: Panam Palmer
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Dark Horse Comics are excited to present the Panam Palmer Figure!  If you think Night City is dangerous, just wait 'till you get to the Badlands. No one knows this more than ex-nomad of the Aldecaldo family, Panam Palmer. Locked in a bitter feud with the current tribe leader, she left to try her luck as a merc in Night City. Panam has her hands full as she fights for a better future for herself and those she cares about. This beautifully detailed figure stands approximately 9 including base.  Don't miss your chance to add this beautiful figure to your collection!
